join6529.metadata.title: Join 6529
join6529.metadata.description: A state-aware guide for connecting a wallet, creating a profile, and joining public Waves on 6529.io.
join6529.title: Join 6529
join6529.subtitle: Start where you are. Connect, create a profile, enter Waves, and get to your first public contribution.
join6529.steps.wallet.title: Connect wallet
join6529.steps.wallet.body: Use a wallet so 6529 can recognize your account and prepare profile setup.
join6529.steps.profile.title: Create profile
join6529.steps.profile.body: Create a profile to join the most interesting crypto conversations on 6529.
join6529.steps.pfp.title: Add profile image
join6529.steps.pfp.body: A profile image helps people recognize you, but it does not block the next steps.
join6529.steps.waves.title: Enter public Waves
join6529.steps.waves.body: Open Waves and find a public conversation worth following.
join6529.steps.message.title: Send first public message
join6529.steps.message.body: Post in a public Wave so the rest of 6529 can meet you.
join6529.current.label: Next step
join6529.current.wallet.title: Connect your wallet
join6529.current.wallet.body: This starts the journey without forcing profile setup before you are ready.
join6529.current.auth.title: Sign in with your wallet
join6529.current.auth.body: Sign once so the app can safely load your 6529 profile state.
join6529.current.profile.loadingBody: We are looking for an existing 6529 profile attached to this wallet.
join6529.current.profile.title: Create your 6529 profile
join6529.current.profile.body: A profile gives you a handle, identity, and the ability to participate in Waves.
join6529.current.waves.title: Find a public Wave
join6529.current.waves.body: Waves are where the daily conversation happens. Open the public feed and pick one thread to enter.
join6529.current.message.title: Send your first public message
join6529.current.message.body: Reply, ask a question, or say gm in a public Wave. This page will mark the step complete once a recent public drop is detected.
join6529.current.pfp.title: Add your profile image when ready
join6529.current.pfp.body: This step stays incomplete until you upload an image, but everything else is already available.
join6529.current.complete.title: You are in
join6529.current.complete.body: You have the basics covered. Keep exploring Waves or create one when you have something to gather people around.
join6529.status.heading: Your state
join6529.status.checkFailed: Could not check recent public messages. The step stays open for now.
join6529.things.heading: Things to do next
join6529.things.subheading: Short jumps into the parts of 6529 people usually need after profile setup.
join6529.things.explore.title: Participate in Waves
join6529.things.explore.body: Read public conversations, reply, and follow the rooms that fit your interests.
join6529.things.help.title: Ask help6529
join6529.things.help.body: Mention @help6529 in a public Wave when you need a quick answer.
join6529.things.subscriptions.title: Learn subscriptions
join6529.things.subscriptions.body: See how profile and Meme subscriptions keep important updates close.
join6529.things.memes.title: Submit a Meme
join6529.things.memes.body: Learn how Meme submissions move through Waves and voting.
join6529.things.delegation.title: Learn delegation
join6529.things.delegation.body: Delegate wallet permissions without moving assets.
join6529.things.createWave.title: Create a Wave
join6529.things.createWave.body: Start a public conversation or a more structured Wave for submissions.
